caption: A man wearing a white shirt, a red bow tie, beige suspenders, glasses, and a large, grey, peaked wig sits in a room filled with framed photographs and clothing. He wears black headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. The background features a wall of framed pictures and a mannequin wearing a black garment. A logo with a microphone icon and the text "ROSS TALK JOY" appears on the right side of the frame, while another logo on the left reads "PODCAST" beneath a graphic containing the word "STUDIO". As the scene progresses, the man remains seated and continues to talk, with subtle movements of his mouth and head. He remains centrally positioned throughout the clip, while the background and equipment remain static.
